data.name: Sex Play - BDSM
data.detailed_description:
ABOUT THE GAME

A quick and dirty game made especially for your pleasure. It contains visual novel elements and a sex simulation part. Here you play the role of a male dominatrix.

GAME DESCRIPTION

Sex Play - BDSM will definitely arouse your senses!
Follow the story of Alexis, an attractive young woman, who comes to your dungeon for an unforgettable BDSM experience.
If you truly want to test her sexual limits, choose from several positions and make her cum loudly!
In this game you will have sexy characters, steamy stories, and high quality graphics.

FEATURES

- HD renders
- HD animations

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
